title: Population Health: Risk Tracking at Scale

seo.title: Population-Level Falls Risk Tracking | Able Care
seo.description: Track falls risk across your entire population. Identify high-risk cohorts, allocate resources and measure outcomes at scale with Able Care's population health tools.

blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Therapist reviewing population health data at desk
blocks.headline: See the whole picture. Act on the risk that matters.
blocks.subtitle: Population-level falls risk tracking for multi-site operators, health systems and commissioners. Stratify risk across every branch, community or clinical site from a single dashboard.

stats.label: Reduction in falls with objective screening

blocks.heading: From individual screening to population insight
blocks.imageAlt: Therapist and patient reviewing Able Assess screening results together
blocks.description: Every Able Assess screening feeds a population-level dashboard. Operators can see risk distribution across branches, track trends over time and identify cohorts that need intervention before outcomes deteriorate. The same data that protects individual residents protects HHVBP, Five-Star and VBP performance at scale.

caseStudies.title: 12-branch Home Care Operator
caseStudies.summary: Deployed Able Assess across all branches in 30 days. Identified three high-risk cohorts in the first month. Reduced hospitalizations by protecting HHVBP outcomes.

caseStudies.title: CCRC with 400+ Residents
caseStudies.summary: Screened entire IL and AL population in two weeks. Stratified risk across four care levels. Reduced resident turnover from falls within the first quarter.

caseStudies.title: NHS Integrated Care Board
caseStudies.summary: Piloted population-level grip strength screening across three community sites. Data fed directly into falls prevention commissioning decisions.

blocks.heading: See your population's risk in one dashboard.
blocks.bodyText: A 20-minute demo with a clinician who has deployed population-level screening.
